tuning: Eb Ab Db Gb Bb Eb
content:
I realize there are 9 other versions of this. That makes it all the sadder that NOT
ONE OF THEM IS CLOSE TO BEING RIGHT. Not one of them is correct even 90% and some are
wildly wrong, with bad chords, wrong qualities (major for minor) and all leave out
really integral maj and dominant 7ths, sustained 2nds and 4ths and other qualities
that make the song interesting. Here is my version (you can finger pick or strum it).

TRUE/Ryan Cabrera

tune down 1/2 step to match recorded version

chords:

[ch]Cadd2[/ch]   X32033
[ch]G[/ch]       320033
[ch]Am7[/ch]     x02010
[ch]Esus4[/ch]   022200
[ch]Em[/ch]      022000
[ch]Em7[/ch]     020030
[ch]Dsus4[/ch]   xx0233
[ch]D[/ch]       XX0232
[ch]D/F#[/ch]    200232
[ch]B7[/ch]      X21202
[ch]Cm[/ch]      x35543
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]      022000
Em-maj7 021000[/tab]
[ch]Em7[/ch]     020000
[tab][ch]Em6[/ch]     040000
Emsus2  024000[/tab]
[ch]A/C#[/ch]    x42225


[Intro] 

[ch]Cadd2[/ch] [ch]G/B[/ch] [ch]Am7[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] [ch]Cadd2[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] [ch]Am7[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]      
     

[Verse]

[tab][ch]Cadd2[/ch]   [ch]G/B[/ch]  [ch]Am7[/ch]     [ch]G[/ch]      [ch]Cadd2[/ch]    [ch]G[/ch]             [ch]Am7[/ch]     [ch]G[/ch]           
I won't talk I won't breathe I won't move 'til you finally see [/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Esus4[/ch] [ch]Em[/ch] [ch]Esus4[/ch] [ch]Em[/ch]
That you belong to me[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cadd2[/ch]     [ch]G/B[/ch]   [ch]Am7[/ch]     [ch]G[/ch]        [ch]Cadd2[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch]           [ch]Am7[/ch]          [ch]G[/ch]  
You might think I don't look but deep down inside in the corner of my mind [/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Esus4[/ch] [ch]Em[/ch] [ch]Esus2[/ch] [ch]Em[/ch]
I'm attached to you[/tab]

[tab][ch]Cadd2[/ch]  [ch]Dsus4[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]      [ch]Em[/ch] [ch]Em7[/ch]        [ch]Dsus4[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch]       
I'm weak      It's true cause I'm afraid I know the answer[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cadd2[/ch]  [ch]Dsus4[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]Em[/ch]  [ch]Em7[/ch]       [ch]Dsus4[/ch]       [ch]D[/ch]       [ch]Cadd2[/ch]
Do you want me too? Cause my heart keeps falling faster[/tab]


[Chorus]

[tab]            [ch]G[/ch]              [ch]D/F#[/ch]            [ch]Em7[/ch]                      [ch]Cadd2[/ch]
I've waited all my life to cross this line to the only thing that's true[/tab]
So I will not hide it's time to try anything to be with you
[tab][ch]B7[/ch]     [ch]Em[/ch]        [ch]Cm[/ch]             [ch]Cadd2[/ch]  [ch]G/B[/ch] [ch]Am7[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]
All my life I've waited this is true[/tab]


[Verse]

[tab][ch]Cadd2[/ch]     [ch]G/B[/ch]  [ch]Am7[/ch]      [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]Cadd2[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]        [ch]Am7[/ch]           [ch]G[/ch]          
You don't know what you do every time you walk into the room [/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Esus4[/ch] [ch]Em[/ch] [ch]Esus2[/ch] [ch]Em[/ch]
I'm afraid to move[/tab]

[tab][ch]Cadd2[/ch] [ch]Dsus4[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]   [ch]Em[/ch] [ch]Em7[/ch]        [ch]Dsus4[/ch]     [ch]D[/ch]      
I'm   weak it's true I'm just scared to know the ending[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cadd2[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch] [ch]Dsus4[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]Dsus4[/ch] [ch]Em[/ch] [ch]Em7[/ch]     [ch]Dsus4[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]       [ch]Cadd2[/ch]
Do you see me          too? Do you even know you met me?[/tab]


[Chorus]

[tab]            [ch]G[/ch]              [ch]D/F#[/ch]            [ch]Em7[/ch]                      [ch]Cadd2[/ch]
I've waited all my life to cross this line to the only thing that's true[/tab]
So I will not hide it's time to try anything to be with you
[tab][ch]B7[/ch]     [ch]Em[/ch]        [ch]Cm[/ch]            
All my life I've waited this is true[/tab]


[Bridge]

[tab][ch]Em[/ch]            Em-maj7          [ch]Em7[/ch]       [ch]A/C#[/ch]
I know when I go       I'll be on way to you[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Am7[/ch] [ch]G/B[/ch]    [ch]Cadd2[/ch]
The way that's true[/tab]


[Chorus]

[tab]            [ch]G[/ch]         [ch]D/F#[/ch]            [ch]Em7[/ch]                       [ch]Cadd2[/ch]
I've waited all my life to cross this line to the only thing that's true[/tab]
So I will not hide it's time to try anything to be with you
[tab][ch]B7[/ch]     [ch]Em[/ch]        [ch]Cm[/ch]             [ch]G[/ch]
All my life I've waited this is true[/tab]
